en: "If anyone sins in that he hears a public adjuration to testify, and though he is a witness, whether he has seen or come to know the matter, yet does not speak, he shall bear his iniquity;
zh: “如果有人犯罪：他聽見發誓的聲音 ；他本是證人，卻不肯把看見或知道的說出來，他就要擔當自己的罪責。

en: or if anyone touches an unclean thing, whether a carcass of an unclean wild animal or a carcass of unclean livestock or a carcass of unclean swarming things, and it is hidden from him and he has become unclean, and he realizes his guilt;
zh: 或人摸了甚麼不潔淨的東西，無論是不潔淨野獸的屍體，或是不潔淨牲畜的屍體，或是不潔淨昆蟲的屍體，當時並不留意，他因為成了不潔淨，就有罪了；

en: or if he touches human uncleanness, of whatever sort the uncleanness may be with which one becomes unclean, and it is hidden from him, when he comes to know it, and realizes his guilt;
zh: 或有人摸了人的污穢，他沒有留意沾染了甚麼污穢；他一知道，就有罪了。

en: or if anyone utters with his lips a rash oath to do evil or to do good, any sort of rash oath that people swear, and it is hidden from him, when he comes to know it, and he realizes his guilt in any of these;
zh: 或有人嘴唇輕率發誓，無論是出於惡意或是出於好意，他沒有留意起了甚麼誓；他一知道，就有罪了。

en: when he realizes his guilt in any of these and confesses the sin he has committed,
zh: 如果他在任何一件事上犯了罪，就要承認自己所犯的罪；

en: he shall bring to the LORD as his compensation for the sin that he has committed, a female from the flock, a lamb or a goat, for a sin offering. And the priest shall make atonement for him for his sin.
zh: 他要為所犯的罪，把贖愆祭帶到耶和華面前當作贖罪祭，就是羊群中的母羊，或綿羊羔或山羊；祭司就為他的罪行贖罪。

en: "But if he cannot afford a lamb, then he shall bring to the LORD as his compensation for the sin that he has committed two turtledoves or two pigeons, one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering.
zh: “他的經濟能力若是不夠獻一隻羊，他就要為所犯的罪，帶兩隻斑鳩或兩隻雛鴿到耶和華面前作贖愆祭，一隻作贖罪祭，一隻作燔祭。

en: He shall bring them to the priest, who shall offer first the one for the sin offering. He shall wring its head from its neck but shall not sever it completely,
zh: 他要把牠們帶到祭司那裡，祭司就要先獻上作為贖罪祭的一隻，把鳥的頭從頸項上扭斷，只是不可撕斷。

en: and he shall sprinkle some of the blood of the sin offering on the side of the altar, while the rest of the blood shall be drained out at the base of the altar; it is a sin offering.
zh: 然後他要把贖罪祭牲的一些血，彈在祭壇旁邊，其餘的血要在祭壇腳那裡擠出來；這是贖罪祭。

en: Then he shall offer the second for a burnt offering according to the rule. And the priest shall make atonement for him for the sin that he has committed, and he shall be forgiven.
zh: 第二隻作為燔祭的鳥，要按照燔祭的規則獻上，祭司為他的罪行贖罪，他就蒙赦免。

en: "But if he cannot afford two turtledoves or two pigeons, then he shall bring as his offering for the sin that he has committed a tenth of an ephah of fine flour for a sin offering. He shall put no oil on it and shall put no frankincense on it, for it is a sin offering.
zh: “他的經濟能力若是不夠獻兩隻斑鳩或兩隻雛鴿，就要為所犯的罪，帶來一公斤的細麵作贖罪祭的供物；供物不可澆上油，也不可加上乳香，因為這是贖罪祭。

en: And he shall bring it to the priest, and the priest shall take a handful of it as its memorial portion and burn this on the altar, on the LORD's food offerings; it is a sin offering.
zh: 他要把供物帶到祭司那裡，祭司從其中取出一把，作為象徵，放在祭壇耶和華的火祭上面焚燒；這是贖罪祭。

en: Thus the priest shall make atonement for him for the sin which he has committed in any one of these things, and he shall be forgiven. And the remainder shall be for the priest, as in the grain offering."
zh: 祭司為他所犯的任何一樣罪贖罪，他就蒙赦免。其餘的祭物 要歸給祭司，好像素祭一樣。”

en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,

"If anyone commits a breach of faith and sins unintentionally in any of the holy things of the LORD, he shall bring to the LORD as his compensation, a ram without blemish out of the flock, valued in silver shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, for a guilt offering.
zh: “如果有人在耶和華的聖物上不忠實，無意犯了罪，他就要依照你按著聖所衡量銀子標準所估的銀價，把他的贖愆祭牲，就是羊群中一隻沒有殘疾的公綿羊，牽到耶和華面前作贖愆祭。

en: He shall also make restitution for what he has done amiss in the holy thing and shall add a fifth to it and give it to the priest. And the priest shall make atonement for him with the ram of the guilt offering, and he shall be forgiven.
zh: 他要補償他在聖物上所虧欠的，另加五分之一，交給祭司；祭司要用贖愆祭的公綿羊為他贖罪，他就蒙赦免。

en: "If anyone sins, doing any of the things that by the LORD's commandments ought not to be done, though he did not know it, then realizes his guilt, he shall bear his iniquity.
zh: “如果有人犯了罪，行了一件耶和華吩咐不可行的事；他雖然不清楚，仍是有罪，他就要擔當自己的罪責。

en: He shall bring to the priest a ram without blemish out of the flock, or its equivalent for a guilt offering, and the priest shall make atonement for him for the mistake that he made unintentionally, and he shall be forgiven.
zh: 他要依照你的估價，從羊群中把一隻沒有殘疾的公綿羊牽來，給祭司作贖愆祭。祭司為他贖罪，那不清楚的無心之失，就蒙赦免。

en: It is a guilt offering; he has indeed incurred guilt before the LORD."
zh: 這是贖愆祭，他在耶和華面前實在有罪。”
